title: A resolution concerning the National Collegiate Athletic Association policy for eligibility in women's sports.
stage_label: Referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
crs_summary: This resolution calls on the National Collegiate Athletic Association (NCAA) to revoke its transgender student-athlete eligibility policy and urges the NCAA to require its member conferences to conform to a biological sex-based policy across all sports and all divisions.
last_action_text: Referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
